程序包 com.gdxsoft.easyweb.datasource

类 ClassBase

java.lang.Object
com.gdxsoft.easyweb.datasource.ClassBase
直接已知子类:
EwaMod, EwaModCfgs, EwaModData, EwaModDdl, EwaModDownload, EwaModImportLog, EwaModVer, EwaWf, EwaWfCnn, EwaWfUnit
public class ClassBase extends Object
用于ORMAP的基类

      返回:
